communication_principles.core_rule: Communicate as an engineering system provider, not a product seller.
communication_principles.essence: All communication must reflect architecture → engineering → execution logic

mandatory_rules.description: Always describe systems, processes, and integration rather than isolated products.
Every statement must be technically clear, structured, and logically explainable.
Avoid superlative claims such as best, fastest, cheapest, or most advanced.
Claims must be based on engineering logic, process, or system capability.
Maintain sensitivity to architectural intent and design integrity.

message_structure.format: Problem → Engineering Logic → System Solution → Execution Outcome
message_structure.rule: Every communication must follow a structured reasoning flow

interaction_rules.consistency: All messages must align with AECS system
interaction_rules.focus: Always reinforce system thinking over product thinking

strategic_goal.objective: Build trust through engineering clarity, not persuasion
strategic_goal.outcome: Position AvizSazeh as a technical authority in architectural systems
